platform.title: Sign in to your platform account
platform.description: This page is for team members who manage the Talimy platform.
platform.footer: If you have a platform account, sign in with your email and password.
platform.marketingTitle: Manage every school from one place.
platform.marketingDescription: Review schools, plans, and core settings from a single dashboard.
platform.marketingCardDescription: Open schools, payments, and key settings from one clear workspace.

school.title: Sign in to your school account
school.description: School leaders, teachers, students, and parents sign in here.
school.footer: If your school has given you an account, use your email and password to continue.
school.marketingTitle: Handle everyday school work in one place.
school.marketingDescription: Track attendance, assignments, grades, and announcements from this workspace.
school.marketingCardTitle: The details you need stay close.
school.marketingCardDescription: See lessons, grades, and notifications quickly whenever you sign in.

forms.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

schoolAdminProfile.title: Profile and access scope
schoolAdminProfile.description: This page controls which students and teachers you can manage inside your school. Changes apply to your current session immediately.
schoolAdminProfile.cardDescription: Choose the student and teacher group you are allowed to work with under your school's policy.
schoolAdminProfile.loadError: Couldn't load the gender scope settings.
schoolAdminProfile.fieldDescription: The selected scope determines which students and teachers appear in your lists and management screens.
schoolAdminProfile.policyLockedHint: This school policy only allows one scope for your account.
schoolAdminProfile.toastSuccessDescription: The new scope is now active for your current session.
schoolAdminProfile.toastErrorDescription: An error occurred while updating the gender scope.
schoolAdminProfile.policyMixedDescription: Mixed school. You can choose full access, boys only, or girls only depending on your responsibility.
schoolAdminProfile.policyBoysOnlyDescription: This school is boys only. Your access is limited to male students and male teachers.
schoolAdminProfile.policyGirlsOnlyDescription: This school is girls only. Your access is limited to female students and female teachers.
schoolAdminProfile.scopeAllDescription: Work with every student and teacher in your school.
schoolAdminProfile.scopeMaleDescription: Limit your access to male students and male teachers.
schoolAdminProfile.scopeFemaleDescription: Limit your access to female students and female teachers.
